ground_truth.title: Graphic Design, Certificate of Achievement
ground_truth.main_content: Moorpark College offers a Graphic Design Certificate of Achievement program within the Design department. This certificate is designed to prepare students for careers in graphic design. The program provides comprehensive training in design principles, visual communication, and industry-standard software applications. Students completing this certificate will have developed the skills necessary for entry-level positions in the graphic design field. The certificate is part of Moorpark College's career and technical education offerings. The 2025-2026 Academic Catalog provides detailed information about this program including required courses, program learning outcomes, and career pathways.
with: Graphic Design, Certificate of Achievement is a program offering at Moorpark College.
The Design department offers multiple programs including Design, Media Arts, and Graphic Design.
This certificate prepares students for careers in the graphic design field.
The program is part of the 2025-2026 Academic Catalog.
Students can explore related programs such as UI/UX Design Basics and Web Design Basics.
